title: Determination (Undertale/Glitchtale)
description: A mod/addon for palladium that add Determination soul ability.
body:
Determination

A power that allows you to do anything... well, not this time.

This is a mod/add-on for Palladium that adds a kind of progression for abilities. Creating the "Reset button" item will allow you to gain the Determination soul trait.

I didn't create anything out of the ordinary, either because of my vision of the determination ability itself or because of my bad coding  ¯\_(ツ)_/¯


This mod is an embodiment of what determination would be like without timelines, erased realities, etc. - controlled energy, chromatics.


At the moment, the mod is as complete as I would like it to be, but I may continue developing it in the future (special hell, dome‌, etc).



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

I'm not going to add other traits. But i hope that there will be people who will also make their own souls on Palladium (but this is just a hope for now)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Some abilities are only used when you're crouching. In case you ask "where are my knife and shield?".... 


</details>




Compatibility
‌

Mod is compatible with bettercombat and epic fight. (except the glowing eyes render for the second one)

‌

Thanks:

Thank you so much [Soulforge](https://modrinth.com/mod/soulforge) team for not posting any sneak peek about Determination trait throughout the years.‌ Thanks to you, I decided to create this addon. (and if I'm being serious, good luck with your mod reworking)


[GlitchTalePlugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/glitchtaleplugin) OscarKoala and C_Callie For inspiration. And for using some textures from your resource pack.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

anyone can use the project files.. (I just want to publish it and be done with it)

</details>
